data.title: As a developer, the planning.external_dependency_block_enabled config flag and the External Dependencies block schema contract are scaffolded for consumption by brainstorm/preplanning/implementation-plan/sprint
data.description:
## Description

**What**: Add config flag planning.external_dependency_block_enabled (default false) to dso-config.conf and CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md; add a shared bash helper (plugins/dso/hooks/lib/) that reads the flag and returns a boolean; write a canonical schema contract document plugins/dso/docs/contracts/external-dependencies-block.md defining the External Dependencies block format, field names, enum values, and optional-field semantics that Stories B/C/D/E/F will reference.

**Why**: Advances SC6 (config-gated rollout) and prevents schema drift across the four skills that read/write the block by giving them a single canonical spec to reference.

**Scope**:
- IN: dso-config.conf entry with default false; CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md update documenting the flag; shared config-reader helper with unit tests; canonical contract markdown (plugins/dso/docs/contracts/external-dependencies-block.md) defining block fields, enum values ({exists, this-epic, linked-epic-<id>}, {claude_auto, user_manual}, {yes, no, unknown}), optional-field semantics, and example block.
- OUT: Any skill-level behavior gated by the flag (handled in Stories B/C/D/E/F); block renderer, reader, filter, or executor logic.

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, the config flag planning.external_dependency_block_enabled exists in dso-config.conf with documented default false and is documented in CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md
  Satisfies: "The entire feature sits behind a config flag planning.external_dependency_block_enabled (default off initially)."
- When this story is complete, a shared bash helper reads the flag from dso-config.conf and returns a boolean; other skills can source it to gate new behavior
  Satisfies: "The entire feature sits behind a config flag planning.external_dependency_block_enabled (default off initially)."
- When this story is complete, plugins/dso/docs/contracts/external-dependencies-block.md exists and defines the block schema as a single canonical reference consumed by Stories B/C/D/E/F
  Satisfies: "/dso:brainstorm Phase 1 scans draft success criteria with a shape heuristic ... renders a distinct ## External Dependencies block ... Each block entry carries required fields"
- When this story is complete, unit tests written and passing for the shared flag-reader helper

## Considerations

- [Maintainability] Config-flag gating pattern established here becomes the canonical example for future flags; document fixture pattern and test conventions
- [Testing] Shared helper tests should follow the structural-boundary pattern (exit code and stdout are the observable contract)
- [Maintainability] Shared schema across 4 skills — contract doc is load-bearing; downstream stories reference it rather than duplicating schema prose in each SKILL.md

## Escalation Policy

**Escalation policy**: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue — one that could send the implementation in the wrong direction. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.
